Meaning.Vi: Thẻ, nhãn, gắn thẻ, thẻ đánh dấu
Meaning.En: A small piece of paper, plastic, or metal attached to an object to identify or describe it; or the act of attaching such a label.
Meaning.Example: The product came with a care tag inside the collar.

Situation.Vi: Một nhãn dán trên quần áo ghi hướng dẫn giặt giũ.
Situation.En: A label sewn into clothing providing washing instructions.

Situation.Vi: Trong lập trình, thẻ HTML xác định cấu trúc trang web.
Situation.En: In programming, an HTML tag defines the structure and elements of a web page.

Meaning.Vi: Gắn thẻ, gắn nhãn, đánh dấu
Meaning.En: To attach a tag to something, or to assign a keyword or label to digital content for categorization.
Meaning.Example: Please tag your photos with relevant keywords like “vacation” or “family”.

Situation.Vi: Gắn thẻ bạn bè vào ảnh trên mạng xã hội.
Situation.En: To mention or identify someone in a social media post or photo.

Situation.Vi: Đánh dấu email là “quan trọng” trong hộp thư đến.
Situation.En: To assign a label (e.g., “Important”) to an email for filtering or reference.

Meaning.En: A children’s game in which one player chases the others and tries to touch (tag) them to make them “it”.
Meaning.Example: The kids were playing tag in the park.

Situation.Vi: Những đứa trẻ chạy quanh sân trường để chơi trò “tag”.
Situation.En: Children running around the schoolyard chasing each other in a game of tag.

Meaning.Vi: Chạm vào (để thắng trong trò chơi “tag”)
Meaning.En: To touch someone quickly in the game of tag, thereby making them the new “it”.
Meaning.Example: She tagged him just before he reached the safe zone.

Situation.Vi: Chạy nhanh để tránh bị bạn tag trong trò chơi ngoài trời.
Situation.En: To run quickly to avoid being touched by another player in the outdoor game.
